title: Volume Calculator - Calculate Volume of 3D Shapes
description: Free volume calculator. Calculate the volume of spheres, cones, cubes, cylinders, rectangular tanks, capsules, ellipsoids, and pyramids.
keywords: volume calculator, sphere volume, cylinder volume, cone volume, cube volume
intro: Calculate the volume of common 3D shapes including spheres, cones, cubes, cylinders, and more.

faq.a: Sphere, cone, cube, cylinder, rectangular tank, capsule, ellipsoid, and square pyramid.
Sphere: 4/3πr³. Cone: 1/3πr²h. Cube: a³. Cylinder: πr²h. Rectangular: l×w×h. Capsule: πr²h+4/3πr³. Ellipsoid: 4/3πabc. Pyramid: 1/3a²h.
